data.caption:
IT’S FIREWORK WEEKEND 🎇🎇🎇

Join us for our 5th Annual Fireworks Celebration at Gary’s Family Resort on Sunday, July 12th!

🕘 Fireworks begin at 9:45 PM — but come early for an evening packed with fun!

🎶 Live Music
🌽 Corn Hole
⛳ 28 Holes of Mini Golf
🪂 Zip Lining (until sundown)
👩‍🎨 Festive Facepainting
🍔 Grab dinner at the Jiffy Pup
🍿 Snack Stand featuring cotton candy, hot dogs, freshly popped movie theater popcorn, and more!

🚗 Please arrive early for parking and to enjoy all the entertainment before the fireworks light up the sky!

🎉 GIVEAWAY TIME! 🎉
Share this post and you’ll be entered into a drawing to win ONE FREE Jiffy Pup meal OR ONE FREE specialty ice cream (including a Banana Split)! 🍔🍌🍨

🏆 The winner can redeem their prize anytime during the remainder of the 2026 season!

Whether you’re camping with us or just stopping by for the evening, everyone is welcome! Bring your family, your friends, and your lawn chairs—we can’t wait to celebrate with you! ❤️🤍💙

For more information, visit https://garysfamilyresort.com

📣 Share this post, tag your friends, and help us make our 5th Annual Fireworks Celebration our biggest one yet! #funatgarys

Come to Gary’s this 5th of July for tons of fun, food, and Fireworks!! 🎇🎆

 #funatgarys #supportlocal #summerfun #fireworks
